restaurants.name: The Mainlander
restaurants.notes: Resy returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked) on all parameterized URL attempts; WebSearch fallback returned no slot-level data. Open Wed–Sat only with fixed seatings at 6:00 PM and 8:30 PM; 6:00 PM seating checked per scope (8:30 PM excluded). Reservations for each month open on the 1st at noon and sell out almost immediately — May 2026 seats are very likely fully booked. Sundays not applicable. Enable Resy Notify Me for cancellations: https://resy.com/cities/st-louis-mo/venues/mainlander

restaurants.name: Robin Restaurant
restaurants.notes: Resy returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked) on all parameterized URL attempts; WebSearch fallback returned no slot-level data. Open Tue–Sat dinner (5–10 PM); closed Sundays — May 24 and May 31 not applicable. 2026 James Beard Award finalist for Best New Restaurant; named in NYT America's Best Restaurants 2025. Rolling 60-day Resy window; typically booked months out. Four bar walk-in seats are the best same-day option. Verify manually: https://resy.com/cities/st-louis-mo/venues/robin-restaurant
